name: Example Home Service
business_model: Local service business with phone, messaging, and form leads
primary_goal: Increase qualified booked jobs without lowering service quality

north_star_metric.name: qualified_jobs_booked
north_star_metric.definition: Booked jobs that meet service-area and service-fit criteria

funnel.success_condition: Visitor reaches a relevant service page
Visitor calls, messages, or submits a form
Lead meets location and service criteria
